description:
Practical backlog summary anchor: **Tier 1 → Lower/earlier thresholds and smaller observation chunks**.

Backlog detail: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 1 / section 3. Lower / earlier observation thresholds and smaller observation chunks**.

Implementation context:
- defaults and config surface live in `packages/pi-om-extension/src/config.ts` and `src/types.ts`
- threshold evaluation and reflection triggering live in `src/engine.ts`
- token counting utilities live in `src/tokens.ts`
- visibility/diagnostics for threshold behavior show up through `src/format.ts`, `/om status`, and related tests

What this epic should establish:
- earlier-but-conservative trigger behavior
- separate policy knobs for staging, publishing, and reflection where needed
- smaller incremental work instead of one giant late extraction pass

Useful references:
- backlog doc section 3
- package README sections on config and lifecycle
- local tests around thresholds and cycle behavior in `src/__tests__/integration`

Stay aligned with the single-session staged-publication design rather than inventing an unrelated buffering system.
title: Lower observation thresholds and smaller incremental chunks
